prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap stocks like CI (Cigna), I estimated an 18-day forecast using historical volatility assumptions. The point estimate assumes modest upward drift typical of equity markets. Confidence intervals are constructed using approximately 15% annualized volatility scaled to 18 days, with appropriate z-scores for each confidence level (50%: ±0.67σ, 80%: ±1.28σ, 90%: ±1.65σ).
